emails.subject: FW: FPL Energy Power Marketing Inc
emails.body: Tana, Per Kathy Moore in EOL, FPL traded under the wrong entity on May 3. Can you draft an Assignment Agreement, moving the below trade from FPL Energy Power Marketing, Inc. to Florida Power Light Company? EOL #1207089 Enron Deal #V76777.1 Thanks, Joe Forwarded by Larry Joe Hunter/HOU/ECT on 05/04/2001 04:00 PM "Moore, Kathy M." <Kathy.M.Moore@ENRON.com> on 05/04/2001 02:53:39 PM
